cellestial.util.utilities
=========================

.. py:module:: cellestial.util.utilities


Functions
---------

.. autoapisummary::

   cellestial.util.utilities.get_mapping
   cellestial.util.utilities.retrieve
   cellestial.util.utilities.slice


Module Contents
---------------

.. py:function:: get_mapping(plot: lets_plot.plot.core.PlotSpec, *, index=0) -> dict

   Returns the mapping of the plot.


.. py:function:: retrieve(plot: lets_plot.plot.core.PlotSpec | lets_plot.plot.subplots.SupPlotsSpec, index: int = 0) -> polars.DataFrame

   Retrieves the dataframe from a PlotSpec or SupPlotsSpec using the index.

   plot : PlotSpec | SupPlotsSpec
       The plot to retrieve the dataframe from.
   index : int, optional
       The index of the figure to retrieve the dataframe from, by default 0

   :returns: The dataframe utilized in the plot.
   :rtype: pl.DataFrame

   :raises TypeError: If the plot is not a PlotSpec or SupPlotsSpec object.


.. py:function:: slice(grid: lets_plot.plot.subplots.SupPlotsSpec, index: int | collections.abc.Sequence[int], **kwargs) -> lets_plot.plot.core.PlotSpec | lets_plot.plot.subplots.SupPlotsSpec | None

   Slice a ggrid (SupPlotsSpec) objects with given index.

   :param grid: The grid to slice.
   :type grid: SupPlotsSpec
   :param index: The index or indices of the plots to slice.
   :type index: int | Sequence[int]
   :param \*\*kwargs: Additional arguments for the `gggrid` function.
                      see: https://lets-plot.org/python/pages/api/lets_plot.gggrid.html
   :type \*\*kwargs: dict[str, Any]

   :returns: The sliced grid.
   :rtype: PlotSpec | SupPlotsSpec

   :raises TypeError: If the grid is not a SupPlotsSpec object.
       If the index is not an int or Sequence[int].
